zh.Greystoke, Cumberland, England: 英國英格蘭波藍德格斯托可
zh.St John the Baptist Churchyard, Bromsgro: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福
zh.Langton Hall, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Greystoke於大約1436年出生在英國波藍德格斯托可時，她的父親Sir Ralph Greystoke31歲，母親Elizabeth II FitzHugh16歲。她於1453年5月13日與Sir Thomas Scrope在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年12月20日之前在英國越可爾馬斯哈姆，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Greystoke于大约1436年出生在英国波藍德格斯托可时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Greystoke31岁，母亲Elizabeth II FitzHugh16岁。她于1453年5月13日与Sir Thomas Scrope在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年12月20日之前在英国越可爾馬斯哈姆，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Greystoke was born about 1436, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, her father, Sir Ralph Greystoke, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth II FitzHugh, was 16. She married Sir Thomas Scrope on 13 May 1453, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died before 20 December 1490, in Masham, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Greystoke est née environ 1436, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Greystoke, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth II FitzHugh, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Scrope le 13 mai 1453, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée avant 20 décembre 1490, à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Greystoke um 1436 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Greystoke 31 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth II FitzHugh 16. Sie hat am 13. Mai 1453 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Scrope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor 20. Dezember 1490 in Masham, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Greystoke è nata il circa 1436 nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Greystoke, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth II FitzHugh, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Scrope il 13 maggio 1453, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 20 dicembre 1490, nel Masham, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolta a Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystokeが約1436年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Greystokeは31歳，母Elizabeth II FitzHughは16歳であった。1453年5月13日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir Thomas Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年12月20日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムで死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアブロムスグローブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greystoke(이)가 대략 1436년 영국 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Greystoke(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth II FitzHugh(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1453년 5월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sir Thomas Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 12월 20일 이전 영국 요르크실르 마샤에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 브롬스그로브에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1436–before 20 December 1490: ойролцоогоор 1436 он–1490 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 20–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Greystoke nasceu aproximadamente 1436, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Greystoke, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth II FitzHugh, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Scrope em 13 de maio de 1453, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 20 de dezembro de 1490, em Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Greystoke родилась около 1436 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Greystoke было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth II FitzHugh, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Scrope 13 мая 1453 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла перед 20 декабрь 1490 г. в местности машам, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности бромсгров, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.about 1436–before 20 December 1490: e tusa o le 1436–a'e le'I oo le 20 Tesema 1490

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Greystoke nació aproximadamente 1436, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Greystoke, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth II FitzHugh, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Scrope el 13 de mayo de 1453, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 20 de diciembre de 1490, en Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
